title: tally.started / tally.completed / tally.verified event payload (v1)
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 20.10's tally subset. Produced by epd2_tally_service.events.tally_state_payload, shared verbatim by build_tally_started_event (tally.started), build_tally_completed_event (tally.completed), and build_tally_verified_event (tally.verified) - verified by reading events.py, all three call the identical payload function. Deliberately excludes result_data/invalid_vote_count/tally_signature (see tally_full_state_payload for Audit Core's complete snapshot). additionalProperties: false is a load-bearing identity-separation control (ADR-009 item 15): account_id, person_id, and identity_record_id are all forbidden and cannot appear on a payload that validates against this schema. completed_at is nullable (null until running -> completed).
